title: Moving ‘Sale’
text:
We are downsizing to a new abode and have lots of items that just won’t fit into the new location. we would LOVE to give these away to someone else who can continue to make good use of them!
Patti & Robin
Click on any image to enlarge or scroll through them.






L-shaped Bar This is a GORGEOUS full bar. Sadly, we are downsizing and can’t fit it.







Desk/Art table - Large table/desk with storage underneath, some dings but can serve lots of purposes.







Queen Bed (with Headboard)









China Display Cabinet -in great shape







Refrigerator (with top freezer)







Lift Chair/Recliner - TChair plugs in and helps someone with mobility issues stand up. Originally expensive! No longer needed









Antique Sofa (with two matching chairs) Set was a wedding present to Patti’s grandparents in 1918! Amazingly, all three are in great shape and very comfortable!







Antique Chair 1







Antique Chair 2









King Bed - Only 6 years old with infrequent use - in great shape







Green Sofa - low profile, very comfortable (matches green recliner)







Green Recliner

title: About
text:
We are downsizing to a new abode and have lots of items that just won’t fit into the new location. We would LOVE to give these away to someone else who can continue to make good use of them!
